welcome.title: Welcome to Clarito
welcome.lead: Accounting and e-Factura for your business — invoices, SPV, returns and journals, all in one place. Let's set up the app in a few steps.
welcome.note: Your data stays local on this device. You can connect ANAF SPV now or later.

license.title: License
license.activeLead: Your license is already active. You can continue the setup.
license.lead: Choose a plan. You can change it anytime from Settings.
license.trialHint: 14 days free, no card required. The trial starts on "Continue".

company.title: Your company
company.lead: Enter the CUI and we'll fill in the rest from the ANAF registry.
company.fetched: Data fetched from the ANAF registry

spv.title: Connect ANAF SPV
spv.lead: Connect the Virtual Private Space for e-Factura: submission, receipts and messages, automatically.
spv.note: A qualified digital certificate (USB token or soft-cert) installed in the browser and a free port 8787 are required. The port can be changed from Settings → ANAF.

serie.title: Invoice series and numbering
serie.lead: Set the series and the number the numbering starts from.

doneStep.title: Ready to go
doneStep.lead: Setup is complete. You can issue your first invoice and sync SPV from the dashboard.
doneStep.notConnectedSettings: Not connected — can be done from Settings

errors.activateFailed: The license could not be activated.
errors.cuiNotFound: The CUI was not found in the ANAF database.
errors.spvIncomplete: The authorization did not complete. Try again or skip this step.
errors.spvFailed: The authorization failed. Check your connection and try again.
errors.serieSaveFailed: The series could not be saved.

notify.customStartNo: Custom starting number — coming soon. Numbering starts from 0001.

expired.title: The license has expired
expired.lead: The 14-day trial period has ended or the license is no longer valid on this machine. Your data is kept locally and will not be deleted.
expired.haveKey: I already have a license — enter the key →
expired.activateLead: Enter the key you received by email after purchase.
